description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a front-hinged door that features a semi-transparent window for viewing the interior. The exterior is primarily a dark brown or gray color, with a control panel located on the right side of the front face. The control panel includes two large, round orange dials and a small rectangular display or label area beneath them. The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, designed for easy gripping and pulling. Ventilation slots are visible on the left side and rear of the microwave, ensuring proper airflow. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and ease of use.
description: A compact, dark-colored microwave oven with a front windowed door, orange dials, and side ventilation slots. The control panel is on the right, and the door handle is integrated for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door with a window, two orange dials, and a small display on the right-side control panel.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the side and back ventilation slots, with the open door visible but the control panel mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing the back panel and central vent, with the door partially visible to the side.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the side ventilation slots and the open door with its window and handle.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring two large, round orange dials stacked one above the other, with a small rectangular display or label area below them. No additional buttons or touchpads are visible.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, rectangular protrusion integrated into the right edge of the door, made of plastic, and designed for easy gripping and pulling. It is flush with the door surface and extends the full height of the door.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on the left side and rear panels of the microwave. The side vents are arranged in horizontal rows, while the rear vent is a single rectangular opening centered on the back.
attribute_window_presence: A semi-transparent rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying a central position and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
